mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.factory_code AS factoryCode, rm.category_code AS categoryCode, rm.positioning_label AS styleCode, r.material_code AS materialCode FROM rsku_supply r JOIN rspu_master rm ON r.rspu_id = rm.rspu_id WHERE r.factory_code = #{factoryCode} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO factory_product_capability ( factory_code, category_code, style_code, material_code, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.categoryCode}, #{item.styleCode}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON CONFLICT (factory_code, category_code, style_code, material_code) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
